services.name: Governmental Tax Rate Calculation Service
services.Trigering Event: A swap operation is initiated or a fiscal policy parameter update is requested
services.Delivered Service: The system provides pool deployers with governmental tax calculation capabilities using familiar terminology (progressive taxation, Pigouvian taxes, etc.) to calculate appropriate tax rates for participants based on governmental fiscal policy principles, ensuring familiar and effective taxation mechanisms that adapt to changing market dynamics.
Assumptions: The fiscal policy parameters are valid and have been properly configured by governance using familiar governmental terminology
The market data used for tax calculation is accurate and up-to-date
The participant classification system correctly identifies different taxpayer types using governmental classification methods
The underlying Uniswap V4 infrastructure provides reliable price and liquidity data

services.name: Governmental Tax Collection Service
services.Trigering Event: A swap operation completes and participants have earned taxable revenue
services.Delivered Service: The system provides pool deployers with governmental tax collection capabilities to collect calculated tax amounts from participants and temporarily hold these funds for redistribution, ensuring that governmental fiscal policies are enforced and tax revenue is captured for redistribution to beneficiaries using familiar governmental tax collection mechanisms.
Assumptions: The taxpayers have sufficient funds to pay the calculated tax
The swap operation completed successfully and generated taxable revenue
The tax collection mechanism does not significantly impact transaction gas costs
The collected tax revenue is secure and cannot be lost or stolen during the collection process

services.name: Governmental Redistribution Service
services.Trigering Event: Collected tax revenue is available for distribution and beneficiaries are eligible for redistribution
services.Delivered Service: The system provides pool deployers with governmental redistribution capabilities to distribute collected tax revenue to beneficiaries based on familiar governmental social policy criteria (commitment levels, contribution to public goods, time-weighted participation), ensuring that beneficiaries receive fair compensation using familiar governmental welfare distribution mechanisms.
Assumptions: Beneficiaries have maintained their eligibility requirements according to governmental social policy criteria
The redistribution calculation algorithm correctly determines each beneficiary's share using familiar governmental methods
The distribution mechanism can handle the number of eligible beneficiaries efficiently
Beneficiaries have valid addresses and can receive the distributed benefits

services.name: Governmental Taxpayer Classification Service
services.Trigering Event: A participant attempts to engage in taxable activities in the system
services.Delivered Service: The system provides pool deployers with governmental taxpayer classification capabilities to classify participants using familiar governmental taxpayer categories (individual, corporate, institutional, etc.) based on their behavior patterns, commitment duration, and other characteristics, ensuring that appropriate governmental fiscal policy rules are applied to each taxpayer type.
Assumptions: The classification criteria are clear and can be objectively measured using familiar governmental methods
The system has sufficient data to make accurate classification decisions
Participants cannot easily game the classification system
The classification remains stable during the commitment period

services.name: Dynamic Tax Rate Adjustment Service
services.Trigering Event: Market conditions change significantly or governance requests a tax rate update
services.Delivered Service: The system adjusts tax rates in real-time based on market conditions, concentration levels, and policy parameters, ensuring that the fiscal policy remains effective and responsive to changing market dynamics while maintaining system stability.
Assumptions: The market condition monitoring system provides accurate and timely data
The tax rate adjustment algorithm is stable and does not cause excessive volatility
Governance has the authority to override automatic adjustments when necessary
The adjustment mechanism does not create opportunities for manipulation

services.name: Commitment Tracking Service
services.Trigering Event: A PLP participant adds liquidity or attempts to modify their position
services.Delivered Service: The system tracks and validates PLP commitment levels, ensuring that participants maintain their minimum commitment requirements and receive appropriate rewards based on their commitment duration and contribution to system stability.
Assumptions: PLP participants understand and agree to the commitment requirements
The commitment tracking mechanism is tamper-proof and accurate
The system can handle the computational load of tracking all PLP commitments
Commitment violations can be detected and handled appropriately

services.name: Market Efficiency Monitoring Service
services.Trigering Event: Trading activity occurs or market conditions change
services.Delivered Service: The system continuously monitors market efficiency metrics including price impact, liquidity distribution, and predatory behavior patterns, providing real-time insights that enable the fiscal policy to maintain optimal market conditions and prevent exploitation.
Assumptions: The monitoring system can process market data in real-time without significant delays
The efficiency metrics accurately reflect market health and participant behavior
The system has sufficient computational resources to perform continuous monitoring
The monitoring data is reliable and not subject to manipulation

services.name: Predatory Behavior Detection Service
services.Trigering Event: Unusual trading patterns or excessive JIT concentration is detected
services.Delivered Service: The system identifies and responds to predatory behavior patterns such as excessive JIT concentration, MEV extraction, or other exploitative practices, implementing countermeasures through increased taxation or other policy adjustments to maintain fair market conditions.
Assumptions: The detection algorithms can accurately identify predatory behavior patterns
The response mechanisms are effective in deterring predatory behavior
False positives in detection do not significantly impact legitimate participants
The system can respond quickly enough to prevent significant damage

services.name: Governance Integration Service
services.Trigering Event: A governance proposal is submitted or a governance decision is made
services.Delivered Service: The system processes governance decisions and implements parameter updates, ensuring that the community can control fiscal policy parameters and system upgrades while maintaining security and preventing unauthorized changes.
Assumptions: The governance mechanism is secure and resistant to manipulation
Governance participants have sufficient knowledge to make informed decisions
The implementation of governance decisions does not compromise system security
The governance process is transparent and auditable

services.name: Policy Customization Service
services.Trigering Event: A pool deployer requests to implement a custom fiscal policy or modify existing policy parameters
services.Delivered Service: The system enables pool deployers to implement custom fiscal policies using classical economic terminology, providing a flexible framework that allows for innovation and customization while maintaining core system principles and security.
Assumptions: Pool deployers have sufficient technical knowledge to implement custom policies
The customization framework prevents implementation of harmful or exploitative policies
Custom policies are properly tested before deployment
The system can efficiently execute different policy implementations

services.name: Audit Trail Service
services.Trigering Event: Any system operation that affects fee collection, distribution, or policy parameters occurs
services.Delivered Service: The system maintains comprehensive audit trails of all operations, ensuring transparency, regulatory compliance, and the ability to trace all system activities for security, governance, and compliance purposes.
Assumptions: The audit trail system can handle the volume of operations without significant performance impact
Audit data is stored securely and cannot be tampered with
The audit trail provides sufficient detail for compliance and security purposes
Audit data can be efficiently queried and analyzed when needed

services.name: System Health Monitoring Service
services.Trigering Event: System operations occur or periodic health checks are scheduled
services.Delivered Service: The system continuously monitors its own health and performance, detecting issues, ensuring optimal operation, and providing alerts when intervention is needed to maintain system stability and security.
Assumptions: The monitoring system can detect all critical issues before they cause significant problems
The system has sufficient redundancy to handle component failures
Health monitoring does not significantly impact system performance
The monitoring system itself is reliable and does not generate false alarms
